rationale: The citing paper’s core contribution is a causal estimate of within-session ad variety effects on next-ad CTR using sequential IPW/imputation methods, while the cited paper focuses on formal attribution definitions and fixed-budget media allocation (FBPM), suggesting limited direct methodological overlap from the notes alone. However, the matched evidence is only a single DOI reference with no in-text citation context, so there is insufficient evidence to confidently classify it as an obvious mention-only citation.
